English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
John W. Hollister papers
Hollister, John W.
7685
3.4 cubic feet. 3.4 cubic feet.
ca. 1980-1990. Printed materials, manuscripts. Notes, announcements, brochures, and publications from gay rights and AIDS organizations in Binghamton, Ithaca, and nationally. Collection material in English <<<<<<< HEAD 8 (unprocessed) 9 (unprocessed) 10 (unprocessed) 11 (unprocessed) 12 (unprocessed) 13 (unprocessed) 14 (unprocessed) ======= 8 (unprocessed) 9 (unprocessed) 10 (unprocessed) 11 (unprocessed) 12 (unprocessed) 13 (unprocessed) 14 (unprocessed) >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 4448445
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
EAD encoding:
Andrea HektorPeter Martinez, Oct. 2003
Date modified:
Jude Corina, January 2017
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Notes, announcements, brochures, and publications from gay rights and AIDS organizations in Binghamton, Ithaca, and nationally.
RELATED MATERIALS
Collecting program: Human Sexuality Collection.
SEPARATED MATERIAL
Cataloged as a HSC collection except for items marked with an asterisk.
Above Ground: News in the Lehigh Valley. August 1996. Allentown, PA.
A Different Light Review: A Catalog of Gay and Lesbian Literature. Spring 1991. New York, NY.
Alabama Forum. Vol. 17 no 11. Birmingham, AL.
Aldyne, Nathan. Vermilion. New York: Ballantine Books, 1980.
Alternatives: The Personal Introduction Service for the Gay, Lesbian, and Bisexual Communities. Albany, NY.
American Book Review. Vol. 9 no. 4. Boulder, CO.
American Sociological Association Newsletter- Section on Sex and Gender- Spring 1993, Fall 1993, Spring 1994.
Art and Understanding- January/February 1993.
Au Courant: The Delaware Valley's Largest Gay/Lesbian Circulation. Philadelphia, PA. (5)
B&G: A Different Point of View. Vol. 1 no. 4. New York, NY.
Back-Talk- June-July 1993.
The Barrister- April 1986.
Bay Windows: New England's Largest Lesbian and Gay Newspaper. Boston, MA. (5)
Being Alive: People with AIDS Action Coalition. Los Angeles, CA. (2)
Blackleather- Spring/Summer 1997
Black/Out: The Magazine of the National Coalition of Black Lesbians and Gays. Vo. 1 no. 1. Washington, DC.
Blade: The Cutting Edge from Orange County & Long Beach. #3.5. Laguna Beach, CA.
Campbell, Michael. Lord Dismiss Us. Chicago: University of Chicago Press, 1967.Bay Windows: New England's Largest Lesbian and Gay Newspaper. Boston, MA. (5)

The Center Voice: Lesbian & Gay Community Services Newsletter. Vol. 6 No. 3. New York, NY.
CLAGS- Newsletter for the Center on Lesbian and Gay Studies- Fall 1992, Spring 1993, Fall 1993, Spring 1994, Fall 1994, Summer 1996.
Cofrancesco, Joan. Walpurgis night. La Jolla, CA: San Diego Poets Press, 1993.
Come to Long Island! Vol. 4 No. 10. (Advertising Supplement)
Coming Up! The Lesbian/Gay Community Calendar of Events and Newspaper for the Bay Area. San Francisco, CA. (3)
Committee on Lesbian and Gay History- Newsletter- December 1987, September 1993, January 1994, January 1995, May 1995, September 1995, January/March 1997, May/September 1997.
Community Yellow Pages: Southern California's Gay and Lesbian Telephone Book. 1994.
Community: the Capital District's lesbian, gay and bi newsmonthly. Albany, NY. (Plus Inserts) (32)
Conference Report: New York State Gay/Lesbian Conference. Syracuse, NY. (5)
The Connection: The STAP Newsletter. Johnson City, NY. (48)
Crossroads: Supporting lesbian, gay, bisexual, and transgender youth. Vol. 2, nos. 3 & 4. Philadelphia, PA.
CUGALA- Cornell University Gay and Lesbian Alumni Association Newsletter- Spring 1993, Winter/Spring 1994, Spring 1996, Spring 1997.
CUSLAR Newsletter- February 1985 (Cornell University Committee on US- Latin America Relations).
The Danny: New York State's Premier Entertainment Guide. Vol. 1 no. 2., May 1990. Rochester, NY.
Destiny Star- 1998 Fall Edition, 1998 Post Mud Season Edition, 1998 Solstice Edition, May 1999 (Issues Number 5, 6, 7, 9).
Digest: The Newsletter of the World Congress of Gay & Lesbian Jewish Organizations. Spring 1984. San Francisco, CA.
Draghead: exploring faeriedom + fey arts. Spring/Summer 1992, Autumn 1992, Spring 1993, Spring 1994, Summer 1994, Winter 1995. Ontario, Canada.
Drummer- 1993, 1996, 1997
Edge Magazine. Los Angeles, CA. (2)
Elite. Vol. 1 No. 6. Oakdale, NY.
Empathy- Fall/Winter 1989/1990.
The Empty Closet. Rochester, NY. (1)
Eros- 1993

The Fifth Column. Syracuse, NY. (4)
The fight for lesbian rights benefits all women. New York, NY.

Frontiers. West Hollywood, CA. (2)
Gai Pied Hebdo. No. 77.

Cite As:
John W. Hollister papers, #7685. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Gay liberation movement. AIDS (Disease) -- Political aspects -- United States.
